name: @tenkacloud/challenge-catalog
description: TenkaCloud problem catalog. Validates metadata.json against SCHEMA.json and cross-refs template.yaml Outputs + portal slot files.

scripts.reindex: bun run scripts/build-index.ts && bun run scripts/estimate-cost.ts --write
scripts.setup: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo 'pre-commit hook enabled (auto-reindex).'
scripts.validate: bun test scripts/validate-problems.test.ts scripts/knowledge-graph.test.ts scripts/validate-simulation-overlay.test.ts scripts/check-simulator-compatibility.test.ts scripts/new-problem.test.ts scripts/readme-contract.test.ts scripts/ai-riscv-soc-repair.test.ts && bun run scripts/validate-problems.ts && bun run scripts/check-template-ascii.ts && bun run scripts/check-template-security.ts && bun run validate:simulator-workload
scripts.validate:simulator-workload: bun install --cwd battles/microservice-migration-battle/services --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts && bun run --cwd battles/microservice-migration-battle/services test && bun run --cwd battles/microservice-migration-battle/services typecheck
